item.title: Memory Forensics
item.description: Plan Intro (#data) Physical drives: a. HDDs (#hdd #data) b. Flash memory (#flash #data)

item.title: Reverse Engineering
item.description: This section comprises all the basic information about fundamental low-level staff. Some topics will include all low-level mechanisms and topics like: TLB, PE files, Secure Enclave, Mobile Boot Processes, how cpu works, assembly and staff.

item.title: Windows Forensics Plan
item.description: Plan for Windows Forensics Done (Udemy watched, tools installed and used, conclusions made) is bolded:
